item.author: frsiam

item.title: 通过 NPM 在 HTML 启动器中使用 Tailwind CSS | Tailwind CSS in HTML starter via NPM
item.description:
本文包括通过包管理器在 HTML 中安装 Tailwind CSS 的步骤以及如何正确处理 Tailwind CSS。 尽管它需要更多设置，但它绝对是利用 Tailwind CSS 可以提供的所有功能的最佳方式。

第 1 步 — 初始化 package.json

注意： -y 标志将对所有问题说“是”

第 2 步 — 安装 Tailwind CSS

 npm install -D tailwindcss@latest

第 3 步 — 包含 Tailwind CSS 指令

现在 Tailwind CSS 已安装，下一步是创建tailwind.css文件并添加以下代码以注入 Tailwind CSS 指令。

 @tailwind base; @tailwind components; @tailwind utilities;

第 4 步 — 设置 Tailwind 配置文件

配置文件可以通过更改任何字体、颜色、间距等轻松自定义 Tailwind CSS 中的类。

将生成一个名为tailwind.config.js的最小配置文件。

 module.exports = { content: ["./index.html"], // Paths to all template files theme: { extend: {}, }, plugins: [], }

第 5 步 — 处理 Tailwind CSS

我们将使用 TailwindCSS CLI 来构建 CSS。 在以下命令./assets/scss/tailwind.css是输入，内置的 css 输出将放在./assets/css/tailwind.css中。

 npx tailwindcss -i ./assets/scss/tailwind.css -o ./assets/css/tailwind.css --watch

我们还可以将以下脚本添加到package.json中，以便使用命令npm run dev轻松构建 CSS。

 "scripts": { "dev": "tailwindcss -i ./assets/scss/tailwind.css -o ./assets/css/tailwind.css --watch", }

第 6 步 — 将 Tailwind CSS 链接到 HTML

创建一个index.html文件； 在 HTML 模板头部分添加以下代码。

 <!-- index.html --> <link rel="stylesheet" href="./assets/css/tailwind.css" />

就是这样。 享受！

帖子Tailwind CSS in HTML starter via NPM首次出现在Anlisha Maharjan上。



原文:

Tailwind CSS is a utility-first CSS framework. This article includes steps to install Tailwind CSS in HTML via package manager and how to properly process Tailwind CSS. Although it requires a bit more setup, it is definitely the best way to make use of all of the features that Tailwind CSS can provide.

Step 1 — Initialize package.json

Note: The -y flag will say yes to all questions

Step 2— Install Tailwind CSS

npm install -D tailwindcss@latest

-D option if to save package to peerDependencies

Step 3— Include Tailwind CSS directives

Now that Tailwind CSS is installed, the next step is creating a tailwind.css file and add the following code to inject the Tailwind CSS directives.

@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

Step 4— Setup Tailwind configuration file

The configuration file makes it easy to customize the classes in Tailwind CSS by changing any fonts, color, spacing, etc.

A minimal configuration file named tailwind.config.js is generated.

module.exports = {
 content: ["./index.html"], // Paths to all template files
 theme: {
  extend: {},
 },
 plugins: [],
}

Step 5— Processing Tailwind CSS

We’ll be using TailwindCSS CLI to build the CSS. In the following command ./assets/scss/tailwind.css is the input, and the built-css output will be placed in ./assets/css/tailwind.css.

npx tailwindcss -i ./assets/scss/tailwind.css -o ./assets/css/tailwind.css --watch

Also we can add the following script into package.json to easily build CSS with command npm run dev .

"scripts": {
"dev": "tailwindcss -i ./assets/scss/tailwind.css -o ./assets/css/tailwind.css --watch",
}

Step 6— Link Tailwind CSS into HTML

Create an index.html file; Add the following code in HTML template head section.

<!-- index.html -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="./assets/css/tailwind.css" />

And This is it. Enjoy!

The post Tailwind CSS in HTML starter via NPM first appeared on Anlisha Maharjan.
item.author: anlishamaharjan

item.title: 您可以使用个性化的旅行杯在任何地方工作。 | You can work anywhere with personalized travel mugs.
item.description:
礼物AFeeling69

发表于您永远不必担心找到完美的礼物或促销产品。 在 GiftAFeeling 为爸爸订购个性化的旅行杯。

旅行杯由不锈钢制成，这款杯子经久耐用。 它带有一个摩擦盖、旋转喷嘴和一个舒适的手柄，为您提供良好的抓地力。 在您的办公桌上旅行，享受您的饮料而不必担心溢出，真是太棒了。 它占用空间小，非常适合您的工作空间、假期和露营。 将此礼物送给您自己或您所爱的人，并通过添加他们最喜欢的个性化文字让他们开心。

克里斯·米切尔莫尔—— 一旦暂停，giftafelling69 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，giftafelling69 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，giftafelling69 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果giftafelling69 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

GiftAFeeling69

Posted on Jul 7

GIftAFeeling is your one stop print shop specializing in research-based giveaways, promotional products & personalized gifts to provide you the best cost efficiency and the highest ROI.
You will never have to worry about finding the perfect gifts or a promotional product. Order personalized travel mugs for dad at GiftAFeeling.

Travel mug is made from stainless steel, this mug is durable. It comes with a friction lid, swivel spout, and a comfort handle to provide you a good grip. It is absolutely awesome to take on your desk, travels, to enjoy your beverages without the fear of spilling. It takes little space, making it good for your work space, vacations, and camping. Gift this to yourself or your loved ones and make them happy by adding their favorite personalized text.

Chris Mitchelmore - Jul 7

Once suspended, giftafelling69 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, giftafelling69 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by giftafelling69 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If giftafelling69 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.
item.author: giftafelling69
